name: Jerk Chicken Fajitas with Papaya-Pineapple Salsa
recipeIngredient: Black beans, cooked and mashed (1 1/2 cup)
Serrano chili pepper, seeded and minced
recipeInstructions:
1. Coat chicken breast halves with jerk seasoning.
2. Marinate for at least 1 hour or overnight in the refrigerator.
3. Place chicken in an 8-inch square dish; cover with vented plastic wrap.
4. Microwave on medium-high for 7-8 minutes. Let stand for 5 minutes.
5. Slice chicken into thin strips.
6. Divide black beans, chicken strips, sour cream, and salsa between tortillas.
7. Fold one edge of the tortilla to form a pocket and roll to hold the filling.
8. Papaya pineapple salsa: Combine papaya, pineapple, jicama, red onion,
serrano chili pepper, garlic, lime zest, lime juice, and cilantro in a bowl.
Cover and refrigerate until ready to serve. For best flavor and texture,
do not make more than 2 hours before serving.
